## Incident communication history

**Incidents in last 90 days:** [N]

**Communication pattern audit:**

| Criterion | Pass / Fail | Finding |
|---|---|---|
| 5-minute acknowledge rule honored | [Pass/Fail] | [Notes] |
| Next-update time included in posts | [Pass/Fail] | |
| Root cause included in resolutions | [Pass/Fail] | |
| Post-mortem cross-links present | [Pass/Fail] | |
| Plain language (no jargon) | [Pass/Fail] | |
| Radio silence gaps > 60 min | [Pass/Fail] | |
